pricing.note: Night surcharges never apply to pre-booked fixed routes. For any other destination, request a quote — we will reply within minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you ride with us.

items.q: How do I book a taxi?
items.a: You can book online through our booking form in under two minutes, call us directly, or send us a WhatsApp message. You will receive a confirmation email with your driver's details and the fixed price.

items.q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.a: Nothing — that is our job to handle. We track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup automatically. Waiting time after landing is free, and there is never a surcharge for delays.
Yes. The price we confirm when you book is final and includes tolls, VAT and luggage. There are no meters, no night surcharges on pre-booked rides, and no surprises.
You pay the driver after the journey, by card or in cash. Corporate clients can request monthly invoicing. No prepayment is ever required to book.
Yes, free of charge. Just mention the age of your child in the special requests field when booking, and we will install the appropriate seat before pickup.

items.q: Where will my driver meet me at the airport?
items.a: Your driver waits in the arrivals hall with a sign showing your name, right after baggage claim. Exact meeting details are included in your confirmation email.

items.q: Can I cancel or change my booking?
items.a: Yes. Cancellations are free up to 12 hours before pickup, and changes are free at any time subject to availability. Just call us or reply to your confirmation email.
Absolutely. We regularly drive to Madrid, Valencia, the Costa Brava, Andorra and southern France, always at a fixed price agreed before departure.

about.title: About StylTaxi
about.subtitle: A Sabadell taxi company built on punctuality, discretion and care.
about.story1: StylTaxi was born in Sabadell with one conviction: a taxi ride should be the easiest part of your day. What began as a small family operation has grown into a trusted transfer service for travellers, families and companies across Catalonia.
about.story2: Every driver in our team is licensed, locally experienced and personally vetted. Every vehicle is inspected, insured and impeccably clean. And every booking — from a five-minute city hop to a cross-country transfer — receives the same attention to detail.
about.story3: We are proudly local. We know the shortcut when the Ronda is jammed, the best hour to reach El Prat, and the exact door of every terminal, port and hotel in the city.

values.title: Punctuality
values.text: We plan every pickup with margin, monitor traffic live, and arrive early — every single time.

values.title: Transparency
values.text: Fixed prices agreed upfront. What we quote is what you pay, with tolls and VAT included.

values.title: Care
values.text: From child seats to a hand with your luggage, the small details are the heart of our service.

about.ctaText: Join thousands of passengers who never worry about transport in Sabadell.

sections.p: StylTaxi ("we", "us") operates the styltaxi.com website and provides taxi and transfer services in Sabadell, Spain. We are the data controller for the personal information collected through this website.

When you make a booking or contact us we collect the details you provide: name, email address, phone number, pickup and destination addresses, travel dates, flight number and any special requests. We do not collect payment card data through this website.

We use your data exclusively to manage your booking, communicate with you about your journey, respond to your enquiries and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your data or use it for third-party advertising.
Processing is based on the performance of the transport contract you request (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and our legitimate interest in responding to enquiries (Art. 6.1.f GDPR).
Booking data is kept for the period required by Spanish tax and transport regulations, and enquiry data for a maximum of 12 months, after which it is deleted.

Under the GDPR you may access, rectify, delete, restrict or object to the processing of your data, and request portability. Contact us at the email address on our contact page. You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD).

Bookings submitted through this website are delivered to us by email processing providers acting on our instructions. Route previews use Google Maps services, which are subject to Google's own privacy policy.
StylTaxi provides licensed taxi and private transfer services in Sabadell and throughout Spain. A booking becomes binding when we send you a written confirmation with the agreed price.
Confirmed prices are fixed and include tolls, VAT and standard luggage. Payment is made to the driver after the journey by card or cash, unless corporate invoicing has been agreed.
Airport pickups include 45 minutes of free waiting after the actual landing time. Other pickups include 15 minutes. Additional waiting may be charged at the standard hourly rate.
Cancellations are free of charge up to 12 hours before the scheduled pickup. Later cancellations or no-shows may be charged up to 100% of the agreed price.
Passengers must provide accurate booking details, use seat belts, and refrain from behaviour that endangers safety. The driver may refuse transport in case of serious misconduct.

We carry the passenger and luggage insurance required by Spanish law. We are not liable for delays caused by force majeure, extreme weather or traffic conditions beyond our control, though we always do our utmost to avoid them.
These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of Sabadell, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protection rules.
